known_large.reason: 已發布 SQLite migration history 集中保留，避免為了排行而拆散資料升級脈絡。
known_large.split_trigger: 新增不相干 schema family 或 migration repair policy

known_large.reason: SQLite current schema DDL 的單一真實來源；大小本身不是拆分訊號。
known_large.split_trigger: DDL family 大到無法 review schema diff

known_large.reason: 內嵌 Objective-C launcher source；大型文字 payload 不代表 Python 控制流程複雜。
known_large.split_trigger: 新增另一個平台或 native launcher payload

known_large.reason: 敏感輸出 redaction policy 集中管理；避免 collector 自行放行 token、URL 或 path。
known_large.split_trigger: 新增大型 URL/path/token/header/metadata redaction family

known_large.reason: Facebook 留言 DOM extraction orchestration；外部脆弱區集中更利於審查。
known_large.split_trigger: 新增 extraction source、diagnostics family 或 collection loop family

known_large.reason: browser-side sort adjustment JavaScript payload 集中保存，避免 Python 行為混入。
known_large.split_trigger: 新增另一個獨立 browser-side payload family

known_large.reason: target runtime state guarded conditional update 的 repository truth source。
known_large.split_trigger: 新增 runtime state family 或 recovery policy

known_large.reason: Windows tray OS callback wiring 與 process control 集中；不得加入產品邏輯。
known_large.split_trigger: 新增 tray command family 或 platform lifecycle behavior

watchlist.reason: Complexity report-only 治理工具 family；已拆分 metric collection、annotation matching、ranking、renderer 與 CLI，新增治理 family 前應維持模組邊界。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增另一個 renderer、annotation kind、metric source 或 report policy family

watchlist.reason: download pipeline split modules；維持 path guard、fetch/hash verification、marker publish 邊界。
must_not_add: manifest key lifecycle or channel policy
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 download policy family 或 cross-platform artifact source

watchlist.reason: release-critical apply orchestration；涉及 lock、staging、backup、replace、restore 與 revalidation。
must_not_add: manifest key lifecycle or channel policy
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 apply mode、rollback policy 或 platform replacement flow

watchlist.reason: release metadata validation gate；download、apply、trust lifecycle 應留在各自模組。
must_not_add: manifest key lifecycle or channel policy
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 release policy family 或整合 download/apply 行為

watchlist.reason: formal resident attempt path；新增 failure、ownership 或 cleanup branch 前需審查。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增另一個 attempt phase 或 ownership family

watchlist.reason: success scan commit transaction；影響 dedupe、history、latest scan 與 notification outbox。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 commit decision family 或另一條 visible write path

watchlist.reason: failure guarded finalize path；影響 failure scan run、guard rejection、runtime failure decision。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 failure decision family 或 runtime failure notification policy

watchlist.reason: notification outbox SQLite truth source；包含 enqueue、claim token、retry 與 stale recovery。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 outbox state family、claim policy 或 endpoint lifecycle policy

watchlist.reason: outbox claim/send/record/failure orchestration；保持 sender I/O 與 repository policy 分離。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 channel family、failure taxonomy、rate limit 或 dead-letter UX

watchlist.reason: dashboard read-model facade；新增 read family 前應先拆 query 或 presenter。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增獨立 dashboard read-model family

watchlist.reason: Facebook feed DOM extraction orchestration 入口；已不再是 known_large，但仍需保護 extraction 與 DB/notification/runtime 邊界。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 extraction source、diagnostics family 或 collection loop family

watchlist.reason: Feed extraction normalization / diagnostics 邊界；小檔案仍需保護職責分離。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 feed extraction payload family 或 selector/wait/resource-loading 行為

watchlist.reason: Comment extraction normalization / diagnostics 邊界；小檔案仍需保護職責分離。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 comment extraction payload family 或 selector/wait/resource-loading 行為

watchlist.reason: auto_adjust_sort native click state machine 橫跨 Playwright stages 與 diagnostics。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 sort mode 或 browser-side wait/click policy

watchlist.reason: TargetApplicationService 應維持 composition facade；產品邏輯先進 focused service。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增產品流程或 facade 持續膨脹

watchlist.reason: async scanner read-side DB seen-stop predicate；collection loop 改動時需重新評估。
watchlist.split_trigger: 重做 collection loop、selector、wait 或 resource loading

watchlist.reason: TargetRow 是 template-facing view model；新增 UI presentation family 前應先拆 presenter。
must_not_add: 新的獨立 dashboard presentation family
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 target status/sidebar/diagnostics/refresh presentation family

watchlist.reason: SidebarGroupSection 聚合 group sidebar display state；新增 group workflow 前先拆 presenter。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 group workflow、group diagnostics 或 group-level presentation family

watchlist.reason: Dashboard scan diagnostics presentation 依 section 與 formatting helper 拆分；不得混入 extractor parsing、DB 寫入或 browser collection 行為。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增與既有 scan/runtime presentation sections 無關的 diagnostics family

watchlist.reason: 本機 launcher glue 負責 CLI、startup、shutdown、tray 與 uvicorn coordination。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 launcher mode、runtime component 或 platform lifecycle behavior

watchlist.reason: Resident metadata refresh job family；不得混入 cover refresh、scan commit 或 dispatch。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增不同 browser/wait/resource-loading 行為的 metadata refresh family

watchlist.reason: Resident cover image maintenance 依 queue/attempt/refresh helper 拆分；image-only refresh 不得混入 target metadata、scan commit 或 notification dispatch。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增另一個 resident maintenance job family 或重大 selector/wait/resource-loading 行為

watchlist.reason: Resident maintenance eligibility/error helper family；只承載 maintenance 共用判斷與錯誤記錄，不擁有 scan commit 或 dispatch。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增獨立 maintenance policy、retention policy 或 state-machine transition family
